economic_notes: First Nation holds 25% of Lower Mattagami Energy Limited Partnership (6 hydro-electric generating stations) through subsidiary Amisk-OO-Skow Finance Corporation. Also holds 25% share in Kimesskanemenow Limited Partnership (winter road construction and maintenance). Moose Cree Group of Companies LP is a significant business enterprise. Received distributions from Detour Gold ($10,550,775) and Ontario Power Generation ($1,576,196). Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions of $2,079,203.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations effective April 1, 2022 — management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential asset retirement obligations, so the financial impact cannot be quantified. Consolidated entities include Moose Cree Education Authority, Amisk-OO-Skow Finance Corporation, and Moose Cree Training and Employment Unit Inc. Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Moose Cree Group of Companies LP, Moose Cree Group GP Ltd, 1929319 Ontario Inc., and Moose Cree Constructors Inc. Portfolio investments of $140,908,262 represent investment in Lower Mattagami Limited Partnership at cost. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($39,782,158) + CMHC ($1,181,225) + Federal other ($72,000) + Province of Ontario ($11,229,924) = $52,265,307. Funds held in trust with Government of Canada of $30,640 reported separately. Schedule of Remuneration not included in the extracted text so remuneration figures are unavailable. The budget was prepared on a modified accrual basis and is not fully comparable to PSAS actuals.
